response.justification: Experienced full-stack engineer with current Staff-level role at re:cinq involving AI-agent infrastructure and MCP tooling, plus prior high-throughput distributed systems work at Sociomantic/Dunnhumby. Strong TypeScript/Node.js background and demonstrated platform ownership via GISCollective. However, Python — a must-have — is not mentioned anywhere on the resume, and evidence of stakeholder management at scale and formal technical-strategy leadership is thin. Worth a screening call to verify Python depth and probe strategy/scope of recent agentic work.
strengths: Hands-on AI-agent infrastructure and MCP code-generator experience at current role
Proven high-throughput distributed systems work (millions of HTTP req/s at Sociomantic)
Long-running platform ownership and craftsmanship practices (TDD, CI/CD, trunk-based)
concerns: No Python listed — a must-have for the role
Limited explicit signals of cross-functional stakeholder management and technical strategy at scale
Most career titles are Senior; Staff scope is recent and unproven over time
